howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.exploreSpotsText: Move the map and tap pins in areas that interest you. You can view photos with camera details. Use the place search to find a place name or facility and move the map there. The shooting location of a photo can be enlarged on the map by tapping the minimap, making it easier to see how it relates to the surroundings.
howToUse.filterPhotosText: Use the filter button at the top left to narrow down by genre, season, time of day, weather, and more. For experienced photographers, you can also filter by device type, focal length, and ISO sensitivity.
howToUse.mapControlsText: You can change the orientation and tilt of the map by dragging with two fingers, or by holding the right mouse button and moving in any direction.
howToUse.compassResetText: When you have changed the map's orientation or tilt, this resets it so that north is at the top of the screen.
howToUse.placeSearchText: Search by place name or facility to move the map to that location.
howToUse.currentLocationText: Displays a marker for your current location on the map.
howToUse.postPhotosText1: Once you create an account and log in, you can post photos via the "+" button at the bottom right. If the photo contains location data, the shooting location is set automatically. (If not, please specify the location manually.)
howToUse.postPhotosText2: For a smoother experience, we recommend keeping location services enabled in your camera app or device when shooting.
howToUse.saveFavoritesText: Add photos you like to your favorites and revisit them later all in one place.
howToUse.enrichProfileText: Add a profile image and SNS links. People interested in your photos may visit your social media.
howToUse.addToHomeText: Add Photlas from your browser to your home screen or desktop for a full-screen experience. On a tablet, you can enjoy the map and photos on a larger screen.
howToUse.languageSwitchText: From the language switcher at the bottom of the menu, you can switch between 5 languages: Japanese, English, Korean, and Chinese (Simplified and Traditional).
howToUse.suggestLocationText: If you find a photo whose shooting location appears wrong, you can suggest the correct one on the map. Your suggestion helps share more accurate information with the community.
howToUse.reportText1: From the photo detail screen, you can report inappropriate content or problematic posts. Reports are reviewed by our team.
howToUse.reportText2: Note that we automatically detect inappropriate content at the time of posting and block likely violations in advance, though some may slip through.

contact.title: Contact
contact.guideText: For feedback, requests, or bug reports, please feel free to contact us at the email address below.

about.title: About Photlas
about.overviewText1: A service for discovering places to visit through photos.
about.overviewText2: Simply scroll the map to find new landscapes you've never seen. When you find an interesting spot, you can pinpoint the exact shooting location and plan your next trip.
about.overviewText3: Just by browsing the map, you'll find your next destination. That's Photlas.
about.feature1Title: Discover shooting spots from the map
about.feature1Text: Pins on the map mark areas where photos have been posted. Select a pin to see all the photos taken in that area. Zoom in or out to switch between a wide overview and detailed exploration of a specific area. Areas with more posts stand out, so popular shooting spots are easy to spot at a glance.
about.feature2Title: Quickly see where each photo was taken
about.feature2Text: For every photo, you can check the shooting location on the map. "Where was this photo taken?" — instantly answered.
about.feature3Title: Find photos you'll love with filters
about.feature3Text: Narrow down photos by genre, season, time of day, weather, and more. You can also search by camera type and shooting settings.
about.feature4Text: Add photos you like to your favorites and revisit them later in one place. Useful for planning your next trip too.
about.feature5Title: Show off your SNS via your profile
about.feature5Text: You can add SNS links to your profile. People interested in your photos may visit your social media.
about.feature6Text: Add Photlas from your browser to your home screen or desktop for a full-screen experience. On a tablet, you can enjoy the map and photos on a larger screen.

location.suggestionInstruction: Move the map to place the blue pin at the correct shooting location.

errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Email not verified. Please click the link in the verification email.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_BURST: The network is congested. Please pause briefly before retrying.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection failed. Please check your connection.
errors.USERNAME_LENGTH_INVALID: Display name must be between 2 and 12 characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTER_FULLWIDTH: Display name cannot contain full-width alphanumerics. Please use half-width characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTER_HALFWIDTH_KAT: Display name cannot contain half-width katakana. Please use full-width katakana.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTER_ZERO_WIDTH: Display name contains invisible special characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTER_OTHER: Display name contains invalid characters. Only letters, digits, Japanese (hiragana, full-width katakana, basic kanji), underscore, and hyphen are allowed.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_FIRST_CHARACTER: Display name must start with a letter or Japanese character (digits, underscore, and hyphen cannot be used as the first character).
errors.USERNAME_RESERVED: This display name is reserved and cannot be used.
